violations.description: Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooling of potentially hazardous food was not accomplished using proper methods. -Use smaller containers to cool down cooked meats. Cut prime in to smaller piesces to cool down properly and monitor cool down temps.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
